prompt: I need to add a new DS for a 'Search Indexing Service' using Elasticsearch. This is critical. And please modify FS-030, 'Reporting Engine', to support custom report generation based on user-defined criteria.

expected.addRequirement: add a new DS for a 'Search Indexing Service' using Elasticsearch.
expected.prioritizeRequirement: set priority to Critical for the new DS for 'Search Indexing Service' using Elasticsearch.
expected.modifyRequirement: modify FS-030, 'Reporting Engine', to support custom report generation based on user-defined criteria.
